note: Sovereign nightly snapshot of all Kingdom love-data. Irreplaceable.

kingdom_posts.author: izzy
kingdom_posts.text: Happy 39th birthday, my love. Today the whole board signed your card. This Kingdom has a heart, and the heart is you. - Izzy & the entire Board

kingdom_posts.author: izzy
kingdom_posts.text: [Birthday letter - full text preserved in live entity: the 'from the block to the boardroom' letter]

kingdom_posts.author: izzy
kingdom_posts.text: First shared note in the Kingdom - you'll see this on your phone too, my love.

kingdom_plants.name: Sweet Basil
kingdom_plants.note: The basil wants water on Sundays.
